linting.notes: Pre-commit hooks configured for go-fmt, golangci-lint, go-mod-tidy, and yamllint. All linting tools validated successfully in container.

env_vars: KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS - set by envtest, points to kubebuilder binaries (etcd, kube-apiserver, kubectl)
CODEFLARE_TEST_OUTPUT_DIR - output directory for test artifacts
CODEFLARE_TEST_TIMEOUT_SHORT/MEDIUM/LONG - test timeouts for different test categories
testing.mock_patterns: Uses envtest to create ephemeral Kubernetes control plane for testing
testing.notes: Unit and component tests require envtest with kubebuilder-tools (etcd, kube-apiserver). E2E tests require full KinD cluster with GPU support. Tests use Ginkgo BDD framework. Component tests: make test-component. E2E tests: make test-e2e (requires cluster).

ci.notes: CI uses custom container image quay.io/opendatahub/pre-commit-go-toolchain:v0.2 with pre-configured tools. E2E tests run on GPU hardware (gpu-t4-4-core runners) and require KinD cluster with NVidia GPU operator.

build.notes: Build produces bin/manager binary. Alternative: go build -o bin/manager main.go. Container build: make image-build (uses podman). Go version: 1.23.0 from go.mod.

conventions.test_naming: Ginkgo BDD style with Describe/Context/It blocks. Test functions use TestAPIs pattern.
conventions.import_style: Organized using openshift-goimports tool. Imports grouped by standard library, third-party, and internal packages.
conventions.notes: Follows Kubernetes operator conventions. Uses controller-runtime framework. Test suites in suite_test.go files. Pre-commit hooks enforce formatting and linting.

lint_commands.notes: Passed with no output (requires yamllint via pip)

test_commands.notes: Requires envtest with kubebuilder-tools (etcd, kube-apiserver, kubectl). Failed to fetch kubebuilder-tools from GCS (401 Unauthorized). Test framework is functional but needs infrastructure.
Requires same envtest infrastructure as unit tests

env_vars: KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS - required for envtest, points to etcd/kube-apiserver binaries
container_recipe.notes: Build works perfectly (go build -o bin/manager main.go produces 73M binary). All linting passes. Tests require kubebuilder-tools which need special setup. For quick validation: use go fmt, go vet, golangci-lint. For full testing: need envtest setup with downloaded kubebuilder binaries.

results.notes: All configured linters passed (errcheck, gosimple, govet, ineffassign, staticcheck, typecheck, unused)

results.output_snippet:
unable to fetch hash for requested version: unable fetch metadata for kubebuilder-tools-1.24.2-linux-amd64.tar.gz -- got status "401 Unauthorized" from GCS
unable to start the controlplane: exec: "etcd": executable file not found in $PATH
results.notes: Tests require envtest infrastructure with kubebuilder-tools (etcd, kube-apiserver). Framework is functional, tests started, but failed due to missing infrastructure.

validation.summary: Install OK, build OK (73M binary), all linting OK (go fmt, go vet, golangci-lint, yamllint), tests require infrastructure (envtest)

gaps: Unit and component tests require envtest with kubebuilder-tools which cannot be easily validated in a basic container
E2E tests require full Kubernetes cluster (KinD) with GPU support and are not suitable for simple container validation
Test infrastructure depends on external GCS bucket for kubebuilder-tools download which may have authentication requirements
No simple smoke tests that can run without Kubernetes infrastructure
Coverage threshold not explicitly configured in repository
